tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Block_Uploads_From_Ubuntu"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "ANY"
set application-list "default"
set utm-status enable
set webfilter-profile "default"
set application-list "default"
set logtraffic all
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
delete 0
edit 0
set name "Allow_Ubuntu_Web_Only"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "HTTP" "HTTPS" "DNS"
set utm-status enable
set webfilter-profile "default"
set logtraffic all
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid f9d90c40-2937-51f1-d69d-ea2eba750bce
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "Allow_Ubuntu_Web_Only"
        set uuid 2a79d25e-29cd-51f1-db0d-d878529b2c1e
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS" "DNS"
        set utm-status enable
set webfilter-profile "default"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
